ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_data" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying asset */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the option */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the option */,
  "daily_hv" REAL /* Daily historical volatility */,
  "intra_hv" REAL /* Intraday historical volatility */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the option contract */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the underlying asset */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the option */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the option */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding contracts for the option */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option traded on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the underlying asset (e.g., Stock, Index) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the underlying asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the underlying asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the market where the asset is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the underlying asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price compared to the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greeks" (
  "greeks_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Greeks data entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the option data */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta of the option */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega of the option */,
  "rho" REAL /* Rho of the option */,
  "vega_100" REAL /* Vega of the option for a 1% change in volatility */,
  "rho_100" REAL /* Rho of the option for a 1% change in interest rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greeks_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greeks_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options_data ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the trading strategy (e.g., Long, Short) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading strategy */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the strategy was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the trading strategy (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading strategy (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest period */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital used for backtesting */,
  "final_capital" REAL /* Final capital after backtesting */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the backtest */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the backtest */,
  "trades_executed" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the backtest */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the backtest period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the backtest performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the option traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the option traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "trade_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trade status (e.g., Open, Closed, Canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options_data ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Open, Close, Modify) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "last_viewed_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
